sentences.sentence: Fresh produce is stocked along the back wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (fr-, -sht, -ck-) and clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Shopping carts wait near the front doors.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (sh-, -nts, -nt) and linking (carts_wait)

sentences.sentence: Discounts on canned goods are listed on the shelf tags.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nts, -nd, -lf) and linking (listed_on)

sentences.sentence: Our staff can help you locate any item in the aisles.
sentences.structure: declarative with prepositional phrase and direct address
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (st-, -ff) and linking (help_you, item_in)

sentences.sentence: Reusable bags can be purchased at every checkout lane.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (can_be, purchased_at) and reduced syllables (reusable)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find a product, ask an associate wearing a red apron.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with participial extension
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundaries (find_a, ask_an) and conditional intonation

sentences.sentence: For weekly specials and store hours, check the printed flyer posted by the main entrance.
sentences.structure: fronted prepositional phrase with comma split and wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across a long sentence and reduced function words (for_our, by_the)

sentences.sentence: The salad bar sits by the windows.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (salad bar) and clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Trays are stacked near the entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (tr-, -cked) and linking (stacked_near)

sentences.sentence: Hot meals are served until eight.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ls) and linking (served_until)

sentences.sentence: The dessert station is included with every meal plan.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (dessert station, meal plan) and linking (is_included)

sentences.sentence: Allergy information can be accessed at the menu board.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (can_be_accessed) and compound noun stress (menu board)

sentences.sentence: The coffee station runs through the entire breakfast service.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (runs_through) and compound noun stress (coffee station, breakfast service)

sentences.sentence: If you have questions about the daily options, check the schedule posted near the serving line.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with comma split and wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation pattern and reduced function words (about_the, near_the)

sentences.sentence: Safety goggles hang by the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (safety goggles) and clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: The eyewash station is mounted along the side counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (is_mounted) and compound noun stress (eyewash station, side counter)

sentences.sentence: Chemical waste is collected in the labeled containers.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (is_collected) and reduced syllables (chemical, labeled, containers)

sentences.sentence: Fire extinguishers are located at both exits.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (located_at) and reduced syllables (extinguishers)

sentences.sentence: Protective gloves are available in the cabinet by the sink.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (available_in) and reduced syllables (protective, available, cabinet)

sentences.sentence: Before you handle any chemicals, tie back long hair and roll up your sleeves.
sentences.structure: fronted temporal clause with compound imperative
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (chemicals, roll_up) and linked speech (before_you)

sentences.sentence: If a spill occurs during your experiment, check the emergency chart mounted beside the main exit.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with comma split and wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation pattern and final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (occurs, chart_mounted)
